articles.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average surrenders a midday rally as Crude Oil and yields climb
articles.expand: There is a delicious irony arriving in Washington on Friday. Kevin Warsh, the man President Trump hand-picked to run the Federal Reserve (Fed) precisely because he is expected to lower interest rates, will be sworn in as chair at the exact moment the market has all but given up on a cut this year.
